_comment: Common suite: the position-specific levers that load .gcg files. These test boards laid out with English words scored against nwl23, so they are meaningful ONLY for the default dictionary/language and are NOT replicated per combo. Always fixed to nwl23-english. See ../nwl23-english/suite.json for the field schema; language-agnostic levers (anagram, enumerate, staticleaves, leavecalc, selfplay, playability) live in the per-combo suites.
